Upcoming surgery

  • Tweet
Date
Friday, 8th May 2026

Casework is undertaken daily and I can resolve your issues if you email directly on [email protected].

Surgery appointments are currently taking place in person, over the phone, or virtually.

If you are interested in attending this surgery, please complete the attached surgery form and return to [email protected].

Once I have received the form, I can confirm your appointment and the specifics of the surgery, including the means by which we shall be communicating.

So that I can help you as efficiently as possible with your queries and request for surgery appointments, please make sure you have included the following information in the attached form:

  • Your name
  • Full residential address including postcode
  • What steps you have taken to try to resolve the problem yourself
  • What you believe I can do to help you
  • Any relevant paperwork
  • For Home Office queries, please forward your Home Office correspondence ID number

Attachments

Attachment Size
Surgery Form (14.9 KB) 14.9 KB
